compiled_state.title: [test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh]: pre-existing failure -> validate.sh --ci flagged
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

tests/.../test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh fails when run via validate.sh / test-batched.sh.

## Symptom
pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh: ticket ID validation rejects valid v3 IDs

## Reproduction
bash tests/[hooks|scripts|integration]/test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh

## Context
Discovered while running validate.sh --ci to unblock scripts/release.sh.
CI on origin/main is GREEN. After fix 7225-7708 (bash-runner.sh honors
SUITE_TEST_INDEX RED markers), the failure remains because no RED marker
exists for these specific function-level failures.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Root cause (verified empirically): bash-runner.sh does not export CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT, so when tests cd into temp git repos and invoke the dso shim, plugin-root resolution fails silently (stderr suppressed by hook). run-hook-tests.sh exports CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT (line 31); bash-runner.sh does not. Confirmed: setting CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT before bash test execution makes the 3 failing tests pass (13 pass / 0 fail).
comments.author: Test
